_schema.purpose: Assumptions registry for model API list prices (CTO update v2 0.1). Public model API list prices, USD per MILLION tokens (input/output). TAIL does NOT hold this — it is the naive list-price input the benchmark then adjusts with TAIL factors. Every record carries source_url, effective_date (retrieval), review_by, verification_status and confidence.
_schema.verification: verified = price read from the vendor's own pricing page/docs (source_url) on effective_date. unverified = the price is NOT on the vendor's current official page (legacy/withdrawn/negotiated) — corroborated third-party only. Unverified models are EXCLUDED from floor/routing/default calculations; they stay user-selectable, labelled 'price unverified'.
_schema.gate: scripts/validate_assumptions.mjs fails the build if any archetype-default or floor-eligible model is unverified or past review_by.

claude_opus_4_8.note: Flagship. Fast Mode $10/$50. 1M context no surcharge.

claude_sonnet_4_6.note: Workhorse; default for the code-assistant use case.

gpt_5_5.note: Flagship, released 2026-04-23. Batch/Flex $2.50/$15. Official source confirmed via search index (vendor page blocks direct fetch). SEE repricing_note.

gpt_5_5_pro.note: Pro tier. Official source confirmed via search index (vendor page blocks direct fetch).

gpt_5_line_pre_apr2026.note: GPT-5 line standard pricing BEFORE the 2026-04-23 increase. HISTORICAL RECORD — not selectable; retained as the real-world repricing proof point (see repricing_note).

gemini_2_5_pro.note: Cheapest frontier-class input among the majors.

grok_3.note: NOT on x.ai's current public pricing page (legacy/enterprise tier as of 2026-07-11) — third-party corroboration only. Excluded from floor/defaults; selectable, labelled 'price unverified'.

grok_3_mini.note: NOT on x.ai's current public pricing page (legacy tier as of 2026-07-11) — third-party corroboration only. Excluded from floor/defaults; selectable, labelled 'price unverified'.

mistral_large_3.note: Output price CONFIRMED 2026-07-11 (was estimated in v0.1). Apache 2.0 open weights (Mistral 3 family).

lfm2_24b_together.note: CORRECTED 2026-07-11: output $0.12/M (v0.1 estimated $0.06). Cheapest production model tracked; open-weights (Liquid AI LFM2).

glm_4_6.note: VERIFIED against z.ai vendor docs 2026-07-11 (was OpenRouter draft). Open-weights; self-hostable.

kimi_k2_0905.note: CORRECTED 2026-07-11 to Moonshot's own platform price $0.40/$2.00 (OpenRouter gateway was $0.60/$2.50). LEGACY K2 family — reported end-of-life risk; short review cycle set.

minimax_m2.note: CORRECTED 2026-07-11 to MiniMax's own platform price $0.30/$1.20 (OpenRouter gateway was $0.255/$1.02). Open-weights.

repricing_note._doc: Real-world proof that the repricing thesis (Phase 1 spec 3b) is not hypothetical: OpenAI DOUBLED the GPT-5 line on 2026-04-23 with GPT-5.5 — input $2.50→$5.00, output $15→$30. Use as the concrete corroboration that current AI pricing is not stable and can move sharply upward.
repricing_note.src: OpenAI GPT-5.5 release pricing, 2026-04-23 (public pricing page).
